mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary policy that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods with FEDFUNDS declines are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A declining unemployment rate signals a tightening labor market that boosts corporate earnings through wage growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods with UNRATE declines are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05) or UNRATE falls > 0.5pp without positive returns.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP and industrial production signals robust economic demand, driving corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Both GDPC1 and INDPRO show growth but SPX 20d returns are negative in > 60% of cases or Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in inflation and interest rates signal monetary tightening that raises discount rates and reduces equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are positive in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL > 240 and FEDFUNDS > 2% or Rank IC > 0.03 over 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production signals strong supply-side capacity utilization, boosting corporate margins and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative in > 60% of INDPRO growth periods or Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts indicate elevated demand for residential construction, driving related sectors and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are negative in > 60% of HOUST > 1000 instances or Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in payrolls and real sales indicates strong labor demand and consumer spending, driving corporate revenues and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Both PAYEMS and RSAFS show growth but SPX 20d returns are negative in > 60% of cases or Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: High GDP growth combined with low unemployment signals an overheating economy, prompting rate hikes that reduce S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are positive in > 60% of GDPC1 > 16000 and UNRATE < 5% periods or Rank IC > 0.03 over 3-year windows.
